summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BenefitPlate MVP - backend APIs working perfectly (100% success), frontend UI mostly functional with one critical eligibility flow issue

ui_bugs.issue: Questionnaire form submission not working - users complete all 9 steps but 'Find Programs' button doesn't navigate to results page

integration_issues.issue: Form submission doesn't trigger navigation to results page - users get stuck on final step

passed_tests: Backend health endpoints (API root, health check)
ZIP lookup functionality (90001 → Los Angeles County, CA)
Landing page with hero section and feature cards
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (11/11 tests passed), Frontend: 85% (most features work except critical eligibility flow completion)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix questionnaire form submission in CheckEligibilityPage - the 'Find Programs' button on final step (Question 9 of 9) doesn't navigate to results page. Users complete all 9 questions but can't see their eligibility results. This blocks the core user flow.
